scenes.text:
Employees trade time for money. Entrepreneurs build
systems that trade value for money.

An employee mindset says how can I get more hours. An entrepreneur mindset says how can I create more value. When you shift from selling your
time to selling solutions, everything changes. Time is limited. Value is unlimited. One YouTube video can earn money while you sleep for the next ten years.

Start thinking in assets, not paychecks. What can you build once that pays you repeatedly? A
course. An app. A brand. A system. That is how you escape the time-for-money trap.

Build the machine that makes money while
you sleep. That is real wealth.

What asset are you building? Share
your vision. Follow for entrepreneur content.
